title: Toleph-Sor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Toleph-Sor''' was a semi-legendary "[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]-[[General/Legends|general]]" who lived during the early days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
It was said that he was responsible for building one of the treasure storehouses of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Presidential Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
